info.title: Radius Core Resource Provider

ApplicationGraphConnection.description: Describes the connection between two resources.

direction.description: The direction of the connection. 'Outbound' indicates this connection specifies the ID of the destination and 'Inbound' indicates indicates this connection specifies the ID of the source.

ApplicationGraphOutputResource.description: Describes an output resource that comprises an application graph resource.

ApplicationGraphResource.description: Describes a resource in the application graph.

outputResources.description: The resources that comprise this resource.

connections.description: The connections between resources in the application graph.

ApplicationGraphResponse.description: Describes the application architecture and its dependencies.

resources.description: The resources in the application graph.

provisioningState.description: The status of the asynchronous operation.

environment.description: Fully qualified resource ID for the environment that the application is linked to

Azure.ResourceManager.CommonTypes.Tracke.title: Tracked Resource
Azure.ResourceManager.CommonTypes.Tracke.description: The resource model definition for an Azure Resource Manager tracked top level resource which has 'tags' and a 'location'

AzureContainerInstanceCompute.description: The Azure container instance compute configuration

resourceGroup.description: The resource group to use for the environment.

BicepAuthenticationMethod.description: Supported authentication methods for private Bicep registries.

values.name: AwsIrsa
values.description: AWS IAM Roles for Service Accounts authentication.

provisioningState.description: The status of the asynchronous operation.

referencedBy.description: Environments that reference this Bicep configuration.

registryAuthentications.description: Authentication configuration for private Bicep registries, keyed by registry hostname (e.g. 'corp.acr.io'). The Bicep driver looks up credentials by the host parsed from the recipe template path.

BicepConfigResource.description: The Bicep configuration resource, providing reusable Bicep recipe settings for environments.

properties.description: The resource-specific properties for this resource.

BicepConfigResourceListResult.description: The response of a BicepConfigResource list operation.

value.description: The BicepConfigResource items on this page

nextLink.description: The link to the next page of items

BicepConfigResourceUpdate.description: The Bicep configuration resource, providing reusable Bicep recipe settings for environments.

BicepRegistryAuthentication.description: Authentication configuration for a single private Bicep registry. When `authenticationMethod` is `BasicAuth`, `basicAuthSecretId` is required; the controller rejects configs that omit it.

authenticationMethod.description: The authentication method to use. Supported values: BasicAuth, AzureWI, AwsIrsa.

basicAuthSecretId.description: The ID of an Applications.Core/SecretStore resource containing username and password for BasicAuth. Required when authenticationMethod is 'BasicAuth'.

azureWiClientId.description: Azure Workload Identity client ID. Required when authenticationMethod is 'AzureWI'.

azureWiTenantId.description: Azure Workload Identity tenant ID. Required when authenticationMethod is 'AzureWI'.

awsIamRoleArn.description: AWS IAM Role ARN for IRSA authentication. Required when authenticationMethod is 'AwsIrsa'.

values.name: Outbound
values.description: The resource defining this connection makes an outbound connection resource specified by this id.

values.name: Inbound
values.description: The resource defining this connection accepts inbound connections from the resource specified by this id.

resourceId.description: The resource id of the compute resource for application environment.

identity.description: Configuration for supported external identity providers

provisioningState.description: The status of the asynchronous operation.

recipePacks.description: List of Recipe Pack resource IDs linked to this environment.

recipeParameters.description: Recipe specific parameters that apply to all resources of a given type in this environment.

providers.description: Cloud provider configuration for the environment.

terraformConfig.description: Resource ID of a Radius.Core/terraformConfigs resource providing Terraform recipe settings.

bicepConfig.description: Resource ID of a Radius.Core/bicepConfigs resource providing Bicep recipe settings.

properties.description: The resource-specific properties for this resource.

value.description: The EnvironmentResource items on this page

IdentitySettingKind.description: IdentitySettingKind is the kind of supported external identity setting

values.name: systemAssignedUserAssigned
values.description: System assigned and user assigned managed identity

IdentitySettings.description: IdentitySettings is the external identity setting.

oidcIssuer.description: The URI for your compute platform's OIDC issuer

resource.description: The resource ID of the provisioned identity

managedIdentity.description: The list of user assigned managed identities

namespace.description: The namespace to use for the environment.

localId.description: The logical identifier scoped to the owning Radius resource. This is only needed or used when a resource has a dependency relationship. LocalIDs do not have any particular format or meaning beyond being compared to determine dependency relationships.

id.description: The UCP resource ID of the underlying resource.

radiusManaged.description: Determines whether Radius manages the lifecycle of the underlying resource.

accountId.description: AWS account ID for AWS resources to be deployed into.

region.description: AWS region for AWS resources to be deployed into.

subscriptionId.description: Azure subscription ID hosting deployed resources.

namespace.description: Kubernetes namespace to deploy workloads into.

ProvisioningState.description: Provisioning state of the resource at the time the operation was called

values.name: Accepted
values.description: The resource create request has been accepted

values.name: Succeeded
values.description: The resource has been successfully provisioned

values.name: Canceled
values.description: The resource provisioning has been canceled

RecipeDefinition.description: Recipe definition for a specific resource type

recipeKind.description: The type of recipe (e.g., Terraform, Bicep)

plainHttp.description: Connect to the location using HTTP (not HTTPS). This should be used when the location is known not to support HTTPS, for example in a locally hosted registry for Bicep recipes. Defaults to false (use HTTPS/TLS)

parameters.description: Parameters to pass to the recipe

provisioningState.description: The status of the asynchronous operation

referencedBy.description: List of environment IDs that reference this recipe pack

recipes.description: Map of resource types to their recipe configurations

properties.description: The resource-specific properties for this resource.

RecipePackResourceListResult.description: The response of a RecipePackResource list operation.

value.description: The RecipePackResource items on this page

nextLink.description: The link to the next page of items

RecipeParameterValue.description: Recipe parameter configuration for a specific resource type.

RecipeStatus.description: Recipe status at deployment time for a resource.

templateKind.description: TemplateKind is the kind of the recipe template used by the portable resource upon deployment.

templatePath.description: TemplatePath is the path of the recipe consumed by the portable resource upon deployment.

templateVersion.description: TemplateVersion is the version number of the template.

compute.description: The compute resource associated with the resource.

recipe.description: The recipe data at the time of deployment

provisioningState.description: The status of the asynchronous operation.

referencedBy.description: Environments that reference this Terraform configuration.

terraformrc.description: Terraform CLI configuration file settings. Maps directly to the Terraform CLI configuration file (.terraformrc).

env.description: Environment variables injected during Terraform recipe execution.

TerraformConfigResource.description: The Terraform configuration resource, providing reusable Terraform recipe settings for environments.

properties.description: The resource-specific properties for this resource.

TerraformConfigResourceListResult.description: The response of a TerraformConfigResource list operation.

value.description: The TerraformConfigResource items on this page

nextLink.description: The link to the next page of items

TerraformConfigResourceUpdate.description: The Terraform configuration resource, providing reusable Terraform recipe settings for environments.

TerraformCredentialConfig.description: Credential configuration for a Terraform registry or module source host.

secret.description: The ID of an Applications.Core/SecretStore resource containing the authentication token. The secret store must have a secret named 'token'.

include.description: Provider address patterns to include for direct installation.

exclude.description: Provider address patterns to exclude from direct installation.

TerraformProviderInstallation.description: Provider installation configuration for Terraform CLI.

networkMirror.description: Network mirror configuration for downloading providers.

TerraformProviderMirror.description: Network mirror configuration for Terraform providers.

url.description: The URL of the provider mirror.

include.description: Provider address patterns to include from this mirror.

exclude.description: Provider address patterns to exclude from this mirror.

TerraformrcConfig.description: Terraform CLI configuration file (.terraformrc) settings. See https://developer.hashicorp.com/terraform/cli/config for details.

providerInstallation.description: Provider installation configuration. Specifies the location of providers via network mirrors or direct downloads.

credentials.description: Credentials for authenticating to private Terraform registries (HTTP-based, e.g. app.terraform.io). Map of registry hostname to credential configuration. Rendered as native `credentials "hostname" {}` blocks in the generated .terraformrc. Note: this is for Terraform CLI registry auth (HTTP), not for Git-based module sources; Git auth is a separate mechanism.

RootScopeParameter.name: rootScope
RootScopeParameter.description: The scope in which the resource is present. UCP Scope is /planes/{planeType}/{planeName}/resourceGroup/{resourcegroupID} and Azure resource scope is /subscriptions/{subscriptionID}/resourceGroup/{resourcegroupID}
